completed: AO role implementation in Faculty model
Audit logging for AO actions in approvalController
Sidebar and Navbar UI updates for AO role
Recovery of classController and Navbar regressions
Database migration to sync faculty roles and fix 'Achivements' typos
Cleaned up student submission labels and placeholders

decisions.context: AOs were being treated as faculty due to stale database fields.
decisions.decision: Ran a migration script to synchronize the 'role' field with 'roleTags' and invalidated caches.
decisions.trade_offs: Requires user to relogin to see updated role in existing sessions.

decisions.context: UI displayed redundant placeholders like 'Enter submitted in asvico portal (y/n)...'
decisions.decision: Implemented label cleaning and conditional placeholders in the Student Status component.
decisions.trade_offs: Relies on string pattern matching for '(y/n)' which handles most but not all edge cases.
